docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $125.00) SERVED DEC-11-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEFFEN, ANDREA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT STEFFEN, ANDREA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 01/10/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM:DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
